meta.source: Tikkun API for Tikkun Wheel_June 11 2026_Final again.xlsx

signs.name: Aries
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to keep the peace until your own voice goes quiet. This life asks you to speak up and lead.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to stop waiting for permission, and to lead with your own strength.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Libra, the South Node of Aries. In past lives you learned to keep everyone happy. You smoothed things over, avoided conflict, and chose your words carefully so no one got upset. That was a real strength, and it kept you safe.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you agree even though you don't, when you hold back what you really think, or when you wait for someone else to decide. You might also see this people-pleasing in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to get rid of this part of you. Just notice it, and use its energy in a new way. Like the scales of Libra, you can see every side, and that ability can help you make your own clear choice. You are not losing your gift for peace. You are adding your own voice to it.
signs.shadowArchetype: The Peacemaker, learning to speak up.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Aries. Your job this life is to stop waiting and start acting. Make your own decisions, take the lead, and say the hard thing kindly and clearly.

Every time you choose for yourself instead of just going along, you grow stronger. Real peace comes from inner strength, not from giving in. Be like the ram. Go first, act with courage, and don't be afraid to begin.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: ה (Hei) means 'window,' an opening. It reminds you to open your mouth and let your own voice out, instead of holding it in to keep the peace.
signs.dailyMantra: Don't just please others. Speak up. Your voice matters.

signs.name: Taurus
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to stay safe by keeping control of everything. This life asks you to relax your grip and trust.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to quiet the worry inside, keep life simple, and let it be enough.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Scorpio, the South Node of Taurus. In past lives you learned to protect yourself. You watched for danger, expected betrayal, and stayed guarded so no one could hurt you. That made you sharp and aware, and it kept you safe.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you test the people who love you, when you doubt good things, or when you can't relax even though life is going well. You might also see this mistrust in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to fight this part of you. Just notice it, and let it rest. Like the scorpion, you know how to stay on guard, and that same strength can become steady trust. It's safe to put the armor down.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Taurus. Your job this life is to move from control to trust, and to enjoy a simple, steady life you don't have to defend.

Let people love you without making them prove it first. Enjoy the good things around you, do honest work, and give because you care. Be like the bull in the field, calm and slow and at peace with what you already have. Enough really can be enough.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: ו (Vav) means 'hook,' the small nail that joins two things together. It reminds you to connect with others without holding on too tightly, so the good in your life can stay.
signs.dailyMantra: Loosen your grip. Trust that good things will come to you.

signs.name: Gemini
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to chase faraway ideas and miss what's right here. This life asks you to focus on the present.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to find the truth in what is right in front of you.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Sagittarius, the South Node of Gemini. In past lives you were a searcher. You were always reaching for the big idea, the next adventure, the bigger truth. That love of meaning is a real gift.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you can't sit still, when you speak before you really listen, or when you chase the next thing to avoid what feels uncomfortable right now. You might also see this restlessness in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to stop being curious. Just bring your attention closer. Like the archer, you know how to aim far, and that same focus can land fully on the person and the moment in front of you.
signs.shadowArchetype: The Seeker, learning to be present.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Gemini. Your job this life is to slow down and pay attention to what's near. That means the real conversation, the person beside you, the small everyday moment.

Ask questions instead of giving answers. Listen more than you teach. Use your gift with words to connect and learn, not just to be right. Be like the Gemini twins, open and curious and interested in the truth right beside you.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: ז (Zayin) means 'sword,' something sharp and focused. It reminds you to cut away the distractions and stay fully present with the one thing in front of you.
signs.dailyMantra: Listen, ask, and stay in the room.

signs.name: Cancer
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to prove your worth through success, while hiding your feelings. This life asks you to be loved as you are.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to be loved for who you are, not for what you achieve.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Capricorn, the South Node of Cancer. In past lives you worked hard for respect. You took on responsibility, stayed in control, and proved yourself through what you achieved. That built real strength.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you measure your worth only by what you get done, when you stay strong instead of letting people see you, or when you feel alone at the top. You might also see this 'I don't need anyone' attitude in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to stop achieving. Just let your guard down. Like the mountain goat, you know how to climb alone, and that same strength can let you come down, rest, and be cared for.
signs.shadowArchetype: The Achiever, learning to be cared for.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Cancer. Your job this life is to soften, and to value home, family, and feelings as much as work and success.

Trust your emotions, and let yourself need other people. Give and receive care freely, without keeping score. Build a real home where you feel safe. Be like the crab coming onto the warm shore. Real strength includes letting others in.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: ח (Chet) means 'fence,' a wall that makes a safe, warm space inside. It reminds you to build a home, and a heart, you can truly live in, and to let yourself be held there.
signs.dailyMantra: Open your heart. It's okay to need other people.

signs.name: Leo
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to live in causes, crowds and the future, missing the people beside you. This life asks you to be present.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to open your heart and care for the people standing right in front of you.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Aquarius, the South Node of Leo. In past lives you lived for big ideas and the group, for the cause, the community, the future. Caring about the world is a real gift.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you give to everyone but stay distant from the few people close to you, or when you find it easier to love humanity than the person in the room. You might also see this distance in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to give up your goals or ideals. Just bring your warmth closer. Like the water bearer pouring out to the crowd, you know how to give widely, and that same warmth can reach the people right next to you.
signs.shadowArchetype: The Visionary, learning to be present.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Leo. Your job this life is to be warm and present with the people closest to you, right now, and not just with the wider world.

Let yourself be seen as you really are. Lead with your heart, and give your time and attention to the people in front of you. Be like the lion, warm and confident and fully here. Shine where you are.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: ט (Tet) means 'hidden good,' something precious kept inside. It reminds you to let your goodness out and share it with the people right around you.
signs.dailyMantra: Be yourself, and be warm with the people in front of you.

signs.name: Virgo
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to escape into feelings and daydreams instead of dealing with real life. This life asks you to stay grounded.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to come out of the daydream, be present, and deal with real life.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Pisces, the South Node of Virgo. In past lives you were sensitive and kind. You were tuned in to feelings and easily moved by the world around you. That openness is beautiful.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you soak up everyone else's moods, when you avoid problems instead of facing them, or when you feel lost without something solid to hold on to. You might also see this drifting in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to lose your sensitivity. Just give it a shape. Like the fish carried by the current, you know how to go with the flow, and that same sensitivity can help you choose your own direction.
signs.shadowArchetype: The Dreamer, learning to stay grounded.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Virgo. Your job this life is to take care of the practical, everyday parts of your life, to be reliable, and to do the small things well.

Set clear limits with people. Use your sharp mind to bring order to your world, and help others in real, practical ways. Be like the gardener tending each plant, steady and careful and focused on the work in front of you.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: י (Yud) means 'hand,' the smallest letter, the place where an idea becomes a real action. It reminds you to turn your dreams into one small, useful thing you actually do today.
signs.dailyMantra: Come back to right now, and do the small thing well.

signs.name: Libra
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to push ahead alone and insist on being right. This life asks you to let other people in.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to lower your guard, let go of being right, and learn the strength of partnership.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Aries, the South Node of Libra. In past lives you learned to stand on your own. You were brave and independent, and sure you didn't need anyone. That built real strength.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you fight instead of listen, when you decide without asking, or when you care more about being right than getting along. You might also see this 'me first' attitude in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to give up your strength. Just let people in. Like the ram leading the charge, you know how to go first and go alone, and that same strength can learn the power of working together.
signs.shadowArchetype: The Warrior, learning the strength of 'we.'
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Libra. Your job this life is to move from 'me' to 'we,' to share, cooperate, and work with others instead of always going it alone.

Let someone help you. Slow down before you react. Treat your close relationships as the place where you grow. Be like the scales of Libra, fair and balanced and open to others. Real wins come from teamwork.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: ל (Lamed) means 'staff,' a teacher's rod, and it is the one Hebrew letter that reaches up above the line. It reminds you to let other people guide and lift you, instead of doing everything alone.
signs.dailyMantra: Lower your guard. Listen, and build together.

signs.name: Scorpio
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to stay in the safe and familiar, afraid of loss. This life asks you to risk real change.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to move from comfort to courage, and to do the hard things that change you.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Taurus, the South Node of Scorpio. In past lives you valued safety and comfort, the stability and security of things you could count on. That steadiness served you well.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you stay somewhere too long, when you avoid change because you're afraid to lose what you have, or when you pick the easy path over the real one. You might also see this stubbornness in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to give up feeling grounded. Just let yourself change. Like the bull resting in the field, you know how to settle, and that same steadiness can help you stay strong while your life changes.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Scorpio. Your job this life is to face change with courage, to look honestly at what you've been avoiding, and to let go of the old so you can grow.

Choose truth over the easy way. Trust that you'll be okay on the other side. Be like the scorpion that isn't afraid of the dark or of starting over. Your greatest strength is in approaching the very thing you're most afraid to face.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: נ (Nun) means 'fish,' something that dives deep. It reminds you to go beneath the surface, let the old version of you fall away, and trust the new one that rises.
signs.dailyMantra: Let go of comfort and control, and step into change.

signs.name: Sagittarius
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to keep all your options open and never fully commit. This life asks you to choose one path.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to stop weighing every option, and give your whole heart to one path.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Gemini, the South Node of Sagittarius. In past lives you became quick and clever. You gathered facts, saw every side, and kept all your choices open. That sharp mind is a gift.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you think instead of act, when you argue every side, or when you keep your options open so long that the chance slips away. You might also see this indecision in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to lose your sharp mind. Just point it in one direction. Like the twins who can debate forever, you can see every angle, and that same mind can pick one path and build on it.
signs.shadowArchetype: The Clever One, learning to commit.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Sagittarius. Your job this life is to choose what you believe in and live by it, with loyalty and honesty.

Pick one meaningful goal and aim for it. Take responsibility for what you know. Be like the archer with one clear target. The deepest meaning comes from something you commit to and build.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: ס (Samech) means 'support,' a closed and protective circle. It reminds you to stop spreading your energy in every direction, and to lean on one solid truth that holds your life together.
signs.dailyMantra: Choose one truth. Focus on it. Live by it.

signs.name: Capricorn
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to hide in comfort and family, avoiding real responsibility for your life. This life asks you to step up.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to leave your comfort zone and take responsibility for your own path.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Cancer, the South Node of Capricorn. In past lives you learned to care for others, for your family, your loved ones, and the people who needed you. That warmth is a real gift.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you put everyone else first to avoid your own path, when you lean on others instead of standing on your own, or when you let old family patterns run your life. You might also see this dependence in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to lose your caring heart. Just add some backbone. Like the crab in its shell, you know how to find safety, and that same care can give you the strength to step out and lead.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Capricorn. Your job this life is to grow into your own strength, to set boundaries, take responsibility, and become someone others can rely on.

It may feel hard, but you're ready. Stop waiting, claim your own direction, and step into a leadership role. Be like the mountain goat climbing steadily upward. Leave the safe shore and make the climb.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: ע (Ayin) means 'eye,' how you see things. It reminds you to look past worry and fear, and to see the world as full of opportunity and your own power to act.
signs.dailyMantra: Take charge. Take responsibility. Climb your mountain.

signs.name: Aquarius
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to want attention and applause, and to need to be seen. This life asks you to share and serve.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to step out of the spotlight, and share your gifts freely with others.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Leo, the South Node of Aquarius. In past lives you stood at the center, leading and performing. That natural shine is a real gift.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you need the attention, when you lead for the applause, or when you give to others but quietly keep score. You might also see this need to be seen in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to hide your light. Just stop needing an audience for it. Like the lion holding court, you know how to draw every eye, and that same warmth can become the joy of giving without needing credit.
signs.shadowArchetype: The Performer, learning to give without applause.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Aquarius. Your job this life is to move from 'me' to 'we,' from the spotlight to friendship, and from getting credit to genuinely helping.

Help out without needing to be thanked. Treat others as equals, not as your audience. Be like the water bearer, sharing freely because it helps people. That's where real happiness comes from.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: צ (Tzadik) means 'fishhook,' something that draws up from deep down. It reminds you to take your gift out of the spotlight and put it into quiet, real help for others.
signs.dailyMantra: Let go of needing applause. Step back, and lift others up.

signs.name: Pisces
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to fix and perfect things, keeping real feelings at a distance. This life asks you to trust and feel.
signs.quote: “Your work in this life is to trust what you can't measure or prove.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your shadow pattern comes from Virgo, the South Node of Pisces. In past lives you were careful and precise. You organized, fixed, and got every detail right before you could rest. That care is a real strength.

But it has become a habit you may not even notice. It shows up when you tidy and fix instead of feel, when you worry instead of trust, or when you criticize yourself and others because things aren't perfect. You might also see this judging in other people before you spot it in yourself.

You don't have to give up your care for detail. Just let it rest sometimes. Like the careful gardener tending every row, you know how to get things right, and that same care can learn to let go and trust.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun, or correction, is in Pisces. Your job this life is to trust that there's more to life than what you can see, measure, or control.

Let go of needing everything to be perfect. Open up, share more, and lean on faith and feeling, not just logic. Be like the two fish that swim in both the everyday world and the deeper waters of the spirit. Step out of the neat garden rows and into the open sea.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: ק (Kuf) means 'the eye of the needle,' a narrow opening between what we see and what we don't. It reminds you to stop measuring everything, and to be present to what can't be measured.
signs.dailyMantra: Put down the checklist. Let yourself feel and float.
